message:
feat(wasm): add parent-child handle ownership and descendant traversal to WASM ABI

Expand the WASM handle table with hierarchical ownership semantics:

- src/types/wasm_abi.rs: Add parent field to WasmHandleEntry, tracking an
  optional parent WasmHandleRef that owns the handle's lifetime. Add
  allocate_with_parent() for creating child handles. Implement
  descendants_postorder() for deterministic post-order traversal of owned
  handle trees — needed for cascading release when a parent handle is
  dropped from JS. Add cascading release logic that walks descendants
  before releasing the parent, preventing dangling handles on the JS side.

- asupersync-browser-core/src/lib.rs: Extend the browser-core API surface
  to expose parent-child handle operations and the new ABI entry points
  for cascading lifecycle management.

- asupersync-browser-core/tests/abi_exports.rs: Add comprehensive tests
  for parent-child handle allocation, descendant traversal ordering,
  cascading release semantics, and edge cases (orphan handles, deep
  trees, re-parenting after release).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
